payload.demand: Looking for a Chinese manufacturer of wireless Bluetooth earbuds. Need 1000 units minimum, CE and FCC certified, custom logo and packaging, budget USD 12-18 per unit. Shipping to Toronto, Canada.
UK importer looking for bamboo kitchenware sets: cutting boards, utensils, serving trays. Minimum 500 sets per SKU. FSC certified, EU food safety compliant. Wholesale price target GBP 8-15 per set.
Australian wholesale toy distributor sourcing STEM educational toys for ages 6-12. EN71 and AS/NZS certified. Minimum 200 units per item, 10 SKUs. Budget AUD 15-40 per unit.
Singapore fashion brand sourcing OEM streetwear manufacturer. 300 pieces per style, 5 styles. Cotton/polyester blend, custom labels, sample within 2 weeks. Target FOB price $8-15 per piece.

webhook_requests.description: Chinese supplier looking for buyer (SUPPLY side demand)

payload.demand: 需要寻找北美宠物用品进口商。浙江宠物玩具工厂，CE认证，MOQ 300件，OEM定制。产品：猫抓板、互动玩具、磨牙棒。年产能100万件。
